nav.filteredByCustomerAria: Filtered by customer: {{name}}. Click to clear.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to KFI Staffing to manage your properties, leases, beds, and occupants.
auth.demoNote: Any email will work for the demo — no password required.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your housing operations and financials.

dormantProperties.title: Properties not touched in {{days}} days
dormantProperties.description: No direct edits, no leases, occupants, beds, rooms, buildings, utilities, costs, certificates, violations, projected move-ins or payroll deductions touched in the window. Confirm the property is still in service or archive it.
dormantProperties.empty: Every property has been touched recently — nothing dormant.

topProperties.title: Top Properties by Rating
topProperties.noRatingsDescription: Rate your properties to see your top performers ranked here.

emptyProperties.title: No properties yet
emptyProperties.topRatedDescription: Add your first property to start ranking your top performers here.
emptyProperties.performanceDescription: Add your first property to start tracking performance here.

performance.noMatchDescription: Pick a different customer above, or add properties to this one to see performance.

digest.previewRenderFailedDescription: Server did not return an email payload.
digest.networkErrorDescription: Could not reach the server. Try again.
digest.dryRunDescription: Enter the admin secret to render the weekly lease digest email without sending it. The recipients won't receive anything.
digest.sendDescription: Enter the admin secret to send the weekly lease digest email now.
digest.emailPreviewDescription: This is exactly what would be POSTed to the digest webhook. Nothing was sent — close to discard, or use "Send now to recipients" if it looks right.
digest.subject: Subject

undoToast.failedDescriptionStatus: Server returned {{status}}. The entry is still in the audit trail — try again.
undoToast.failedDescriptionNetwork: Could not reach the server. The entry is still in the audit trail — try again.

reclaim.failedDescriptionSingle: Server returned {{status}}. Try again or re-claim all.
reclaim.claimedDescription: The occupant's charge has been reset to the payroll value.
reclaim.claimedDescriptionWithSummary: Reset to payroll value. Imported {{count}} deductions for week ending {{week}} — total {{total}}.
reclaim.allClaimedDescriptionWithSummary: Imported {{count}} deductions for week ending {{week}} — total {{total}}.

needsReviewItems.hotelRateAtRiskLabel: Hotel-rate leases at risk this month ({{month}})

noticeDeadline.title: Notice deadline approaching
noticeDeadline.helperText: Leases whose non-renewal notice deadline lands in the next {{days}} days. Snoozing the lease in the expiry panel above also hides it here.

lowOccupancy.title: Low combined occupancy
lowOccupancy.helperText: Customers below {{pct}}% combined bed occupancy across owned + shared properties.

insurance.title: Insurance expiry alerts
insurance.helperText: Insurance certificates whose coverage ends in the next 90 days, plus any that quietly lapsed in the last 30 days.

customerPaidRent.title: Customer-paid monthly rent
customerPaidRent.descriptionActive: Total monthly rent across all Active leases where the customer is responsible for paying the landlord.
customerPaidRent.descriptionUpcoming: Forecast monthly rent across Upcoming customer-responsible leases that haven't started yet.
customerPaidRent.descriptionAll: Total monthly rent across all customer-responsible leases (Active, Upcoming, and Expired).

payrollSnapshot.title: Import payroll snapshot
payrollSnapshot.helperText: Pick the Saturday end-date of a Mon→Sat pay-week and import a payroll snapshot for it. The Finance tabs read these snapshots to build the Weekly / Monthly / By-Customer rollups. Re-importing the same week overwrites in place.
payrollSnapshot.importedDescription: Wrote {{count}} deduction(s) totalling {{total}} for week ending {{week}}.
payrollSnapshot.importedDescriptionEmpty: No matching payroll deductions for week ending {{week}}.

payrollMismatches.title: Review payroll mismatches
payrollMismatches.helperText: Occupants whose payroll-set charge was manually edited. Compare against the latest payroll run — if the override now agrees with payroll, re-claim to let the seeder manage it again.

confirmMatch.title: Confirm match
confirmMatch.helperText: Payroll rows that matched an existing occupant only by name. At employers with two namesakes the wrong person may have received the rate — confirm the right one (or pick a different occupant) so the next sync locks the match in by Person Id.

recentReconciliations.title: Recently reconciled from payroll
recentReconciliations.helperText: Suggestion clicks from this session. Open an occupant to sanity-check the new employer / weekly rate, or undo the change if the seeder guessed wrong.

leaseExpiry.title: Lease expiry alerts
leaseExpiry.helperText: Leases ending in the next 30 / 60 / 90 days, plus any that quietly expired in the last 30 days.
leaseExpiry.snoozesClearedDescription_one: {{count}} lease alert restored to the panel.
leaseExpiry.snoozesClearedDescription_other: {{count}} lease alerts restored to the panel.

employerMove.confirmTitle: Move occupant to a new employer?
employerMove.confirmDescription: Move <1>{{occupant}}</1> from <3>{{from}}</3> to <5>{{to}}</5>? This changes which customer the occupant belongs to.
employerMove.confirmDescriptionWithProperty: Move <1>{{occupant}}</1> from <3>{{from}}</3> to <5>{{to}}</5> at <7>{{property}}</7>? This changes which customer the occupant belongs to.

crossEmployer.confirmDescription: This will move <1>{{occupant}}</1> back from <3>{{employer}}</3> to <5>{{prevCompany}}</5>, and restore the previous charge and employee ID.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Companies that lease beds across your portfolio.
customers.cantDeleteTooltip_one: Can't delete — {{name}} still owns {{count}} property. Reassign or remove those properties first.
customers.cantDeleteTooltip_other: Can't delete — {{name}} still owns {{count}} properties. Reassign or remove those properties first.

empty.noCustomersDescription: Add your first customer to start grouping properties and leases by client.

dialog.addDescription: Customers represent the companies that lease beds in your properties.
dialog.stateHint: Two-letter US state code. Used to group customers on the Customers page.
dialog.noHousingHint: Only meaningful for customers with no properties managed in KFI Staffing.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this customer?
deleteDialog.stillOwns_one: {{name}} still owns {{count}} property. You'll need to reassign or remove those properties before this customer can be deleted.
deleteDialog.stillOwns_other: {{name}} still owns {{count}} properties. You'll need to reassign or remove those properties before this customer can be deleted.
deleteDialog.permanentlyRemove: This permanently removes {{name}}. This action cannot be undone.

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Select a property to manage it

empty.noPropertiesDescription: Add your first property to start tracking beds, leases, and utilities.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try clearing your search or filter above.
empty.addFirstDescription: Add your first property to start tracking beds, leases, and utilities.
empty.tryClearing: Try clearing your search or filters above.

addressReview.title: Addresses Google can't pinpoint
addressReview.helper: Google had no result for these addresses this session. Open each property to fix the street, city, or ZIP and the pin will return on the next map view.
addressReview.retryAllTitle: Re-attempt every address Google couldn't pinpoint
addressReview.dismissTitle: Hide this row for the rest of the session
addressReview.undoTitle: Bring this address back to the active list

map.noMatchFilters: No properties match the current filters.
map.everyHasAddress: Every property in view has an address. Pins on the map cover them all.
map.noMappedNote_one: None of the {{count}} property in view has an address yet — see the side panel.
map.noMappedNote_other: None of the {{count}} properties in view has an address yet — see the side panel.

addDialog.title: Add property
addDialog.description: Every property is owned by a customer. Pick an existing one or create a new customer inline.

propertyDetail.notFoundDescription: This property may have been deleted. Head back to the dashboard or pick another property from the list.
propertyDetail.payrollDeductionsLast13: Payroll deductions vs rent — last 13 pay-weeks
propertyDetail.payrollDeductionsEmpty: No payroll deduction snapshots have been recorded for this property yet.
propertyDetail.droppedNotice: Some records for this property were hidden due to data issues
propertyDetail.statHotelRateLogPrompt: Hotel-rate · log room-nights to estimate revenue
propertyDetail.roomTotalsEmpty: No rooms yet. Add rooms on the
propertyDetail.noRecurringCosts: No recurring costs yet — add one (e.g. "Cleaning fee").

leasesDropzone.headline: Drop lease PDFs here, or click to choose
leasesDropzone.helper: Multiple files supported. Max 10 MB each. Image-only / scanned PDFs aren't supported (OCR is off).

propertyDetail.noRoomsDescription: Add your first room to start tracking beds and occupants for this property.

bedRate.title: Bed weekly rate
bedRate.description: Set the weekly rate effective from a Saturday onward. The rate rolls forward until you enter a later override.

propertyDetail.noBedsInRoom: No beds in this room yet
propertyDetail.noBedsInRoomDescription: Add the first bed to {{room}} so you can assign an occupant.
propertyDetail.noUtilitiesDescription: Track power, water, internet, and other monthly services for this property.
propertyDetail.noCertificatesDescription: Track renter's or liability policies here so the coverage window and source PDF are one click away.
propertyDetail.bedAriaLabelVacant: Bed {{number}} — Vacant. Open in Beds tab.

deleteUtility.title: Delete this utility?
deleteUtility.descriptionSuffix: service from this property. You can't undo this.

deleteCertificate.title: Delete this certificate?
deleteCertificate.descriptionSuffix: certificate from this property. You can't undo this.

responsibilities.placeholder: e.g. Take out trash on Mondays

violations.deleteDescriptionSuffix: notice from {{group}}. You can't undo this.
violations.whatKindPlaceholder: Short description of the rule that was broken
violations.notesEmailPlaceholder: Paste the notification email body here, or jot down what the property manager said.

leases.title: Leases
leases.noActiveLeaseInScope: No customer has an Active lease in the current filter scope.

beds.title: Beds
beds.description: Track individual bed inventory and assignments
beds.deleteBedDescription: This permanently removes the bed from {{property}}. Any history tied to this bed will be lost and you can't undo this.

empty.noBedsDescription: Add a property and its rooms to start tracking beds.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try clearing your search or filters above.

occupants.title: Occupants
occupants.addPropertyFirstTooltip: Add a property first — occupants are assigned to beds inside a property.
occupants.addOccupantTooltip: Open a property to assign an occupant to one of its beds.
occupants.deleteOccupantConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the occupant record. Any bed currently assigned to them will be cleared. You can't undo this.

empty.noOccupantsDescription: Assign your first occupant to a bed to see them here.
empty.noMatchDescription: Try clearing your search or filters above.

utilities.title: Utilities
utilities.description: All utility services across your portfolio

empty.noUtilitiesDescription: Utilities you add to a property will show up here.

payroll.importDescription: Pick the Saturday end-date of a Mon→Sat pay-week, then re-run the payroll reconciler. The matched deductions are saved as a snapshot for that week — re-importing the same week overwrites in place.
payroll.invalidWeekDescription: Pay-weeks end on Saturday — pick a Saturday date.
payroll.reimportedDescription: Snapshot saved for week ending {{week}}. {{unmatched}} unmatched, {{review}} need review.
payroll.noSnapshotsDescription: No pay-week snapshots have been recorded yet. Re-import a Saturday pay-week from the dashboard to start tracking.

empty.noPropertiesDescription: Add your first property to start seeing revenue and expenses here.
empty.noMatchDescription: Adjust the customer filter above to see revenue and expenses.

trend.title: Monthly Trend (trailing 12 months)
trend.empty: No room-night history yet — trend will appear once monthly logs are recorded.

utilityBreakdown.title: Utility Expense Breakdown
utilityBreakdown.empty: No utility expenses recorded for the current filter.

ranking.title: Property Profitability Ranking
ranking.empty: Add active leases or occupants to start ranking properties by profitability.

rentRoll.title: Rent Roll (active leases)
rentRoll.empty: No active leases for the current filter.

insurance.title: Insurance Certificates
insurance.description: Track renter's and liability insurance certificates across all properties

empty.noCertificatesDescription: Add a certificate to start tracking coverage across your properties.

settings.title: Settings
settings.digestRecipientsDescription: These email addresses receive the weekly lease-expiry digest. Changes take effect on the next scheduled send — no redeploy required.
settings.noRecipients: No recipients configured yet. Add an email above to get started.
settings.removeDescription: {{email}} will no longer receive the weekly lease-expiry digest.

customerDetail.notFoundDescription: This customer may have been deleted. Head back to the dashboard or pick another customer from the list.
customerDetail.customerPaidRentDescription: Sum of monthly rent on Active leases this customer is on the hook for. Hotel-rate leases are listed below but excluded from this total — their rent depends on logged room-nights, not a fixed monthly amount.
customerDetail.noCustomerPaidLeases: No leases are currently flagged as customer-paid.
customerDetail.customerPaidHelper: Sum of monthly rent on Active leases this customer is on the hook for. Hotel-rate leases are listed below but excluded from this total — their rent depends on logged room-nights, not a fixed monthly amount.
customerDetail.noLeasesFlagged: No leases are currently flagged as customer-paid.
customerDetail.noPropertiesYet: This customer has no properties yet.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. It may have been moved or the record may have been deleted.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong on this page
errorBoundary.description: The rest of the app is still working. Try again, or use the sidebar to go somewhere else.

emptyState.leasesDescription: Leases you create or import will appear here.

sidebar.resetDataConfirmDescription: This clears every saved change in this browser — customers, properties, leases, beds, occupants, and utilities — and reloads the original demo data. This action cannot be undone.
sidebar.resetDemoConfirmDescription: Wipes every edit in this browser and reseeds the demo dataset so you can re-run the demo cleanly between investor takes. This action cannot be undone.
sidebar.importingFileSuffix: . Choose how it should be applied to your current data.
sidebar.importModeReplaceDescription: Wipe every customer, property, lease, bed, occupant, and utility in this browser and load only what's in the file. Use this to restore a backup or move to a new browser.
sidebar.importModeMergeDescription: Add records from the file as new entries, update any existing records that share the same id, and keep everything else you already have. Use this to combine data from another teammate's export.
sidebar.importReplaceWarning: Your current data will be lost. Consider exporting first if you want a backup.
sidebar.importLegacyNote_one: This backup was made before Customers existed. We'll create a single "Legacy Properties" customer and assign all {{count}} imported property to it. You can re-assign them on the Properties page afterwards.
sidebar.importLegacyNote_other: This backup was made before Customers existed. We'll create a single "Legacy Properties" customer and assign all {{count}} imported properties to it. You can re-assign them on the Properties page afterwards.
sidebar.mergeOverwritesToggle: Show records that would be overwritten ({{count}})
sidebar.mergeOverwritesWarning: These existing records share an id with the file and will be replaced. Any local edits to them will be lost.

addLease.title: Add Lease
addLease.description: Pick the property this lease covers, then fill in the dates and amounts.
addLease.noPropertiesYet: No properties yet. Add one first.

assignOccupant.title: Assign Occupant to Bed
assignOccupant.pickPropertyVacant: Pick a property with a vacant bed
assignOccupant.noVacantProperty: No properties have a vacant bed

renewLease.title: Renew lease
renewLease.noEndDate: This lease has no end date yet — pick one below.
renewLease.invalidDatePickFirst: Pick a new end date before applying.
renewLease.invalidDateAfterCurrent: New end date must be after the current end date.

addBuilding.title: Add building
addBuilding.descriptionWithLease: Create a new building and its first lease in one step.
addBuilding.descriptionBuildingOnly: Create a building with no lease — use this for hotels or other shared-occupancy buildings.
addBuilding.descriptionRetryLease: Building saved. Add the first lease, or close the dialog to add it later.
addBuilding.errorBuildingCreate: Couldn't create the building. Please try again.
addBuilding.errorLeaseCreate: Building saved, but we couldn't create the first lease. Adjust the lease and try again, or close to add the lease later.

uploadPdf.descriptionPick: Drop one or more text-based lease PDFs (or pick them). We'll extract the key fields with AI and let you review each one before saving.
uploadPdf.descriptionQueue: Each PDF is parsed independently. Review and save them one at a time — you can do this in any order.
uploadPdf.descriptionReview: Confirm the details parsed from the PDF, then attach it to an existing property or create a new one. The PDF itself is not stored.
uploadPdf.dropzonePrimary: Drag and drop lease PDFs here, or click to choose files
uploadPdf.dropzoneHint: Multiple files supported. Max 10 MB each. Image-only / scanned PDFs aren't supported (OCR is off).
uploadPdf.noCloseMatches: No close matches found in your portfolio. We'll create a new property.

leasesPage.noLeasesYetDescription: Add a lease manually or upload a PDF to get started.

toasts.sampleDataRestoredDescription: All saved changes were cleared and the demo data was reloaded.
toasts.demoResetDescription: Edits cleared and the demo dataset was reseeded. Ready for the next take.
toasts.exportFailedDescription: Could not generate the export file. Please try again.
toasts.dataExportedDescription: Saved {{file}} with {{customers}} customers, {{properties}} properties, {{leases}} leases, {{beds}} beds, {{occupants}} occupants, {{utilities}} utilities.
toasts.couldNotReadFileDescription: That file is not valid JSON. Please choose a KFI Staffing export file.
toasts.cantImportFallback: That file doesn't look like a KFI Staffing export. No changes were made.
toasts.importFailedFallback: Something went wrong while importing. No changes were made.
toasts.dataMergedDescription: From {{file}}: {{added}} added, {{updated}} updated.{{unchangedNote}} Existing records not in the file were kept.
toasts.dataMergedDescriptionLegacy: {{file}} was made before Customers existed. We created a "Legacy Properties" customer for the migrated properties. {{added}} added, {{updated}} updated.{{unchangedNote}}
toasts.dataImportedDescriptionLegacy: {{file}} was made before Customers existed. We created a "Legacy Properties" customer and assigned all {{count}} imported properties to it. Loaded {{counts}}.
toasts.importCounts: {{customers}} customers, {{properties}} properties, {{leases}} leases, {{beds}} beds, {{occupants}} occupants, {{utilities}} utilities, {{roomNightLogs}} room-night logs
toasts.cantUndoImportDescription: The undo window has expired. Re-import your previous backup file to restore that data.
toasts.newCustomerNameRequiredDescription: Please enter a name for the new customer.
toasts.customerSelectionRequiredDescription: Please select a customer or create a new one.
toasts.couldntCreateCustomerDescription: The new customer couldn't be saved. The property was not created.
toasts.customerCantDeleteDescription: {{name}} still owns one or more properties. Reassign or remove those properties first.
toasts.deleteFailedDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.
toasts.couldntCreatePropertyDescription: Saving failed on the server. Please verify the customer exists and try again.
toasts.markedAsReviewedDescription: The 'Needs review' flag has been cleared.
toasts.markedManyAsReviewedDescription: Cleared the 'Needs review' flag on {{count}} leases.
toasts.markedManyAsReviewedDescription_one: Cleared the 'Needs review' flag on {{count}} lease.
toasts.invalidEmailDescription: Please enter a valid email address.

geocode.couldntLocateDescription: Google had no result for {{name}}'s address. The property saved without a map pin — open it to fix the street, city, or ZIP.
geocode.couldntRetryDescription: Google Maps key isn't loaded yet. Try again in a moment.
geocode.stillCouldntPinpointDescription: Google has no result for this address. Edit it to try a different spelling.
geocode.foundItDescription: Google pinpointed this address. Removing it from the list.
geocode.retryFailedDescription: Couldn't reach Google Maps. Check your connection and try again.
geocode.nonePinpointedConnectionDescription: Couldn't reach Google for {{errored}} of {{total}}. Check your connection and try again.
geocode.nonePinpointedMixedDescription: {{stillFailing}} of {{total}} still need attention; {{errored}} couldn't be attempted.
geocode.nonePinpointedNeedAttentionDescription: {{total}} still need attention. Try editing the addresses.
geocode.fixedSomeWithErroredDescription: {{stillFailing}} still need attention; {{errored}} couldn't be attempted.

toasts.failedToRemoveDescription: Could not remove recipient. Try again.
